name: cad-spec-gen
description: CAD pipeline skill: design doc → design review → structured spec → code generation → 2D drawings → 3D renders → photorealistic images

skills.name: CAD Pipeline Assistant
skills.description: Natural-language assistant for the CAD rendering pipeline (16 intents: env check, config validation, next-step recommendation, materials, camera, exploded view, rendering, AI enhancement, troubleshooting, file structure, status, cross-model integration, BOM/parts, CAD spec, codegen, design review)

skills.name: CAD Spec Generator
skills.description: Phase 1: Extract 9 categories of structured data from design documents into CAD_SPEC.md. Supports --review mode: mechanical(A1-A3)/assembly(B1-B8)/material(C1-C3)/completeness(D) checks → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → user iterate / auto-fill (--auto-fill) / proceed → CAD_SPEC.md

skills.name: CAD Code Generator
skills.description: Phase 2: Generate CadQuery scaffolds (params.py, build_all.py, assembly.py, part modules) from CAD_SPEC.md using Jinja2 templates. Scaffold mode (default) never overwrites engineer-modified files.

skills.name: Gemini AI Enhancement
skills.description: Phase 5: Enhance Blender-rendered PNG to photorealistic JPG via Gemini AI (geometry locked, reskin only). 3 prompt templates for standard/exploded/orthographic views.

skills.name: Parametric Mechanical Design
skills.description: Manual parametric mechanical subsystem workflow: params.py → CadQuery 3D → GB/T 2D drawings → Blender rendering → AI enhancement. 6 phases with sub-command routing. Use /cad-codegen for automated scaffold generation first.

tools.name: cad_pipeline
tools.description: Unified 6-phase pipeline orchestrator: spec → codegen → build → render → enhance → annotate

tools.name: cad_spec_gen
tools.description: Extract structured CAD spec from Markdown design documents

tools.name: bom_parser
tools.description: Parse BOM tables from design documents into tree/JSON/summary

tools.name: gemini_enhance
tools.description: Image-to-image AI enhancement: Blender PNG → photorealistic JPG (geometry locked)

tools.name: annotate_render
tools.description: Add component labels (CN/EN) to rendered images via PIL. Leader lines + text on semi-transparent background.

pipeline.overview: Design Doc (.md) → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → CAD_SPEC.md → Jinja2 codegen → CadQuery (STEP/DXF/GLB) → Blender Cycles PNG → Gemini AI JPG → Annotated JPG
stages: Phase 1 SPEC: Design review + spec extraction (cad_spec_gen.py --review)
Phase 2 CODEGEN: Jinja2 templates → CadQuery scaffolds (codegen/gen_*.py)
Phase 3 BUILD: Parametric modeling → STEP + DXF + GLB (build_all.py)
Phase 4 RENDER: Blender Cycles N-view PNG (render_3d.py + render_exploded.py)
Phase 5 ENHANCE: AI enhancement → photorealistic JPG (Gemini, geometry locked)
